mapper.insert: INSERT INTO node_access_party ( organ_id, organ_name, organ_gateway, apply_reason, access_level, ip_whitelist, valid_from, valid_until, apply_status, is_active, is_del, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{organId}, #{organName}, #{organGateway}, #{applyReason}, #{accessLevel}, #{ipWhitelist}, #{validFrom}, #{validUntil}, COALESCE(#{applyStatus}, 0), COALESCE(#{isActive}, 1), 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE node_access_party
organ_name = #{organName}, organ_gateway = #{organGateway}, apply_reason = #{applyReason}, access_level = #{accessLevel}, ip_whitelist = #{ipWhitelist}, valid_from = #{validFrom}, valid_until = #{validUntil}, apply_status = #{applyStatus}, approve_user_id = #{approveUserId}, approve_user_name = #{approveUserName}, approve_comment = #{approveComment}, approve_date = #{approveDate}, is_active = #{isActive}, update_date = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE node_access_party SET is_del = 1, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM node_access_party WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
SELECT * FROM node_access_party WHERE organ_id = #{organId} AND is_del = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE node_access_party SET apply_status = #{applyStatus}, approve_user_id = #{approveUserId}, approve_user_name = #{approveUserName}, approve_comment = #{approveComment}, approve_date = NOW(), update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE node_access_party SET is_active = #{isActive}, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE node_access_party SET access_level = #{accessLevel}, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM node_access_party WHERE apply_status = 0 AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY create_date ASC
SELECT * FROM node_access_party WHERE apply_status = 1 AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY approve_date DESC
